summary: Frontend e2e testing of ClearSpace complete. All 15 requested flows pass — landing hero, trilingual switching (EN/ES/PT-BR), nav anchors, packages with Stripe checkout redirect, gallery filters, FAQ accordion, 4-step intake form with validation, admin login/dashboard (leads/gallery/transactions CRUD), admin logout + route guard, and /success expired state. No critical issues found. One minor UX concern: intake Next/Submit button is not visually disabled on invalid steps — validation uses toast + block advancement instead.

issues: Next/Submit button is never visually disabled when the step is invalid — it always appears green & clickable. Clicking it on an invalid step correctly blocks advancement and shows a 'Please complete this step' toast, so the flow is safe, but the button state does not reflect validity. UX improvement: also disable the button when canNext()===false so users see immediate feedback.

action_items: (Optional UX) In /app/frontend/src/pages/Intake.jsx line 347, change `disabled={submitting}` to `disabled={submitting || !canNext()}` so the Next/Submit button visually reflects step validity. Backend + functional flow already work correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Intake.jsx Next button relies on toast-only validation; consider disabling the button to give users clearer affordance.
Success.jsx polls /checkout/status up to 6 times on 404 before showing expired — works but produces 6 noisy axios 404 errors in console; consider treating 404 as immediate expired.

Stripe checkout session creation works end-to-end: POST /api/checkout/session returns 200, frontend performs window.location redirect to https://checkout.stripe.com/... Verified via route interception (cs_test_a1mwp2az...).
Admin dashboard correctly seeds 3 leads, 3 gallery items, and 3 transactions — Add/Delete gallery is fully working (3→4→3 verified).
seed_data_creation: Submitted one real test lead via frontend (name='TEST User', email='test_frontend@example.com', phone='555-1234', space='garage', package='standard'). Created + deleted one gallery item 'TEST_AdminUpload' during admin CRUD test. One additional Stripe checkout session (basic pkg) was created during checkout redirect verification.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All frontend flows verified on https://space-transform-59.preview.emergentagent.com. The Stripe checkout status 502 bug from iteration_1 was NOT re-verified in this run, but the /success expired fallback path (6 retries on failure) correctly renders the expired UI, so even if the status endpoint is still broken the UX degrades gracefully. Admin seed data: 3 leads, 3 gallery items, 3 transactions. Footer 'Admin' link is present and navigates to /admin/login.
rca of the issue: None — no failing flows in this iteration.
